title: vitex urbanii
intro: Vitex urbanii, also known as the Mexican sage, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate menstrual cramps, anxiety, and digestive issues. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to support hormonal balance, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. Vitex urbanii can be consumed as herbal tea, tincture, or supplement, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
